mid.text:
A man and a woman are sitting in chairs facing each other, having a conversation. The man is wearing a black t-shirt and the woman is wearing a black turtleneck. They are discussing the concept of speciation in models and the impact of compute infrastructure constraints.

First thing heard: "and I think we we should be able to see more speciation."

long.text:
A man and a woman are sitting in chairs facing each other, engaged in a conversation. The man is wearing a black t-shirt and dark green pants, while the woman is wearing a black sleeveless turtleneck and black pants. They are both holding microphones and appear to be recording a podcast or interview.

The first thing that can be heard is the man saying, "And I think we we should be able to see more speciation."
The last thing that can be heard is the man saying, "It would be the extrapolation."
